sections.heading: Biography
sections.content: Sam Ananias is a systems engineer and software architect. With over a decade of experience designing fault-tolerant distributed engines, cloud computing schedulers, and developer-centric tooling, Sam specializes in combining high-level application orchestration with low-level systems execution.

sections.heading: Philosophy
sections.content: I believe in building software that is readable, robust, and highly optimized. Good software systems are invisible—they run quietly, recover automatically, and scale predictably.
